examples: Hexokinase is an important enzyme in the metabolism of glucose by cells.
Hexokinase I Antibody detects endogenous levels of total hexokinase I protein.
Hexokinase I (C35C4) Rabbit mAb detects endogenous levels of total hexokinase I protein.
Through efforts by his lab and others, he discovered that one of the most abundant proteins in mammalian sperm, hexokinase, is also the first enzyme in the glycolysis assembly line on its tail.
